root_query: metal-organic frameworks (MOFs) gas adsorption capacity dataset

scientific_papers.name: Enhanced CO2 capture potential of UiO-66-NH2 synthesized by sonochemical method

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: manual article/table extraction with unit verification

scientific_papers.notes: Candidate source for functionalized UiO-66 CO2 adsorption.

scientific_papers.name: Development of HKUST-1 composites for methane storage

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: extract tabular values if available; otherwise postpone until figure extraction workflow

scientific_papers.notes: Candidate source for CH4 storage records.

scientific_papers.name: Nanosized Cu-MOFs induced by graphene oxide and enhanced gas storage capacity
expected_data_content: Cu-BTC and GO@Cu-BTC composite material descriptors
CO2 capacity at 273 K and 1 atm
H2 capacity at 77 K and 42 atm
CO2, H2, CH4 and N2 isotherm figures
expected_conflicts: table endpoints versus visually digitized isotherm points
composite material identity versus parent Cu-BTC
capacity units differ between H2 wt% and CO2 mmol/g

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: use Table 1 as high-confidence source; keep figure digitization as low-confidence preview until QA

scientific_papers.notes: Parsed records are stored in data/extracted/pdf_parsed_records.csv and data/extracted/pdf_parsed_materials.csv.

scientific_papers.name: NPF-200 hydrogen volumetric working capacity article
expected_data_content: working capacity between 100 and 5 bar at 77 K
expected_conflicts: working capacity is not a single isotherm point
some required MOF identity fields are in article/SI rather than page 6 text
figure digitization from small plot has lower confidence

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: use text endpoints as candidate records; verify MOF formula/linker and pressure-range semantics before final inclusion

scientific_papers.notes: Parsed records are stored in data/extracted/pdf_parsed_records.csv and data/extracted/pdf_parsed_materials.csv.

databases.name: NIST/ARPA-E Database of Novel and Emerging Adsorbent Materials (NIST ISODB)

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: API or structured export with source DOI retained

databases.notes: Primary candidate for machine-readable adsorption capacity points.

databases.name: MOFX-DB
databases.access_method: web interface and JSON API probe (/mofs.json?page=1)
expected_conflicts: source category metadata requires review before larger-scale reuse
ambiguous unit labels in some isotherm objects
MOF identity differs between display name, source identifier, and CIF content

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: small API probes first; keep records only with clear source category metadata, units, and license notes

databases.notes: Useful for testing web/API parsing and MOF identity fields; not yet accepted as final experimental data.

databases.name: CoRE MOF Database
expected_conflicts: multiple structures for one MOF name

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: use for MOF identity and descriptor enrichment

databases.notes: Useful for the optional separate MOF materials table.

databases.name: Cambridge Structural Database (CSD)
expected_conflicts: multiple refcodes for similar MOF names

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: use refcodes and structural metadata for MOF identity resolution

databases.notes: Candidate authority for defining whether two names refer to the same MOF.

aggregators.name: Google Scholar
aggregators.notes: Used to find scientific literature, not direct dataset records.

github_repositories.name: GitHub search results for MOF adsorption datasets
github_repositories.license_information: repository-specific; must be checked before use

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: inspect candidate repositories individually; include only if license and provenance are clear

github_repositories.notes: Discovery source only until individual repositories are reviewed.

huggingface_datasets.name: AtomMOF-data
huggingface_datasets.license_information: listed as other; must be checked before use

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: use as discovery/background source unless capacity values and provenance are explicit

huggingface_datasets.notes: Relevant to MOF-adsorbate data but likely not primary experimental records.

huggingface_datasets.name: MaCBench MOF capacity subsets
huggingface_datasets.license_information: MIT; dataset card states evaluation-only use
expected_conflicts: evaluation benchmark rather than raw experimental dataset
data may be transformed into QA format

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: do not use as final training dataset source; inspect only for schema examples and source discovery

huggingface_datasets.notes: Useful evidence that MOF capacity extraction appears in public benchmarks.

kaggle_datasets.name: Metal-Organic Frame Materials Prediction
kaggle_datasets.license_information: Kaggle dataset-specific license must be checked
expected_conflicts: ML features without raw adsorption conditions
may not contain experimental gas capacity records

extraction_strategy.recommended_method: inspect files and use only if capacity units, conditions, and provenance are explicit

kaggle_datasets.notes: Candidate discovery source for MOF descriptors and ML-ready tables.
